title: intermediate-images inherit-label test: make it debuggable
body:
Test is currently very hard to debug on failure. Fix that
by adding unique test descriptors and a little whitespace.

Also, fix a broken/NOP test (copypaste artifact)

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: @kolyshkin point taken, but I was going for ease of review to get this in ASAP (for your #4832, actually, in case it could be helpful in tracking down that weird CI failure).
